summary: Completed comprehensive testing of hardware storefront system. Backend APIs 94.1% successful, frontend navigation and integration working well with minor dialog issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Product dialog did not open when Add Product button clicked

passed_tests: Dashboard loading with correct stats (Revenue: $34.54, 1 transaction, 1 product, 1 vendor)
All 8 departments seeded correctly (LUM, PLU, ELE, PNT, TOL, HDW, GDN, APP)
Department page showing 9 departments including test department
SKU generation working in correct format (LUM-00001)
Inventory page showing 1 product with correct details
POS page loading with cart and products panels
Navigation sidebar working for all pages
Vendors page loading with vendor data
Reports page loading with sales and inventory tabs
Backend products CRUD with SKU generation
Backend POS sales functionality with tax calculations
success_percentage: Backend: 94.1% (16/17 tests), Frontend: 90% (most functionality working with 1 dialog issue)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix product dialog opening issue in inventory page - Add Product button clicks but dialog may not be opening due to modal/dialog state management
